theme.description: A cinematic, moody, and expensive personal library feel with deep ambient lighting, built for focused reading and elegant display.

typography.instructions: Always apply logical typography scaling. Ensure font-weight is slightly higher for Arabic text (e.g. font-medium instead of font-normal) to match the visual weight of English fonts.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Generous Spacing (E1 System). Never use tight paddings for structural containers.

grid_system.homepage: Bento Grid pattern. Use grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8.
grid_system.book_list: Responsive grid (grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6) with gap-6.

layout_and_spacing.rtl_support: CRITICAL: Do NOT use left/right utilities (ml-4, pr-2). ALWAYS use logical properties (ms-4, me-4, ps-2, pe-2, border-s). Add dir='rtl' attribute to the HTML tag when the Arabic language is selected.

surfaces_and_components.glassmorphism: Use heavily for navigation, floating player/reader controls, and feature cards. Classes: `backdrop-blur-2xl bg-white/5 border border-white/10 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.4)]`.

buttons.primary: bg-brand-primary text-white font-medium px-6 py-3 rounded-full transition-all hover:bg-brand-primary_hover shadow-lg hover:shadow-brand-primary/50
buttons.secondary: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/10 border border-white/20 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-white/20 transition-all

motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Fade and slight slide up (y: 20 -> 0) using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interaction.micro_interactions: All buttons and cards must have active:scale-95 transition-transform duration-200.
motion_and_interaction.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for text against backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, inputs, tabs) MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='read-book-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Include Google Fonts for 'Playfair Display', 'Outfit', 'Amiri', and 'Tajawal'.
Replace the bland homepage with a large cinematic hero section featuring the aurora_texture as a slow-moving background under a dark glass overlay.
Refactor Arabic components to use logical Tailwind properties (e.g. start/end instead of left/right) to properly support RTL directions seamlessly.
Redesign book cards to be taller (aspect-[2/3]), removing any card borders and relying on the cover image and typography for hierarchy.
Ensure the reading interface has a clean, distraction-free 'Zen' mode, allowing readers to toggle between dark, sepia, and light themes.
